calendar.matters: MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-10-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On November 25,2002
Off Calendar Dec-05-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on calendar regularly as scheduled for hearing this day on Interlocutory Judgment. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: June Leathley. Daniel Piccinini, Esq. appeared for the plaintiff. Default entered against Roy C. Thomas. The following exhibits were introduced and marked into evidence: l) Grant Deed; 2) Certified Copy of Death Certificate; 3) Sale of Order approving Petition of Instructions; 4) Ligation - Guarantee Title Report. The Court receives evidence and good cause appearing, grants Interlocutory Judgment as prayed for in the petition and takes the matter under submission for counsel to submit to the Court the nomination of a referee to sell the property. The Court orders the exibits returned to counsel for safe-keeping.
